memory.recent_lessons_md:
### 2026-06-11 Pre-Market

**LMT estimate was wrong by 18%.** Prior watchlist had LMT at ~$640, actual price $525 (down 24% from highs on Q1 earnings miss). LESSON: Always verify actual price before scoring. The $640 estimate was never verified against market data.

**Defense sector = 'buy the anticipation, sell the war.'** ITA ETF down 12% since Iran war began March 2026. LMT tumbled 13% on Q1 miss. The 'Iran war = defense catalyst' narrative was already priced in at war onset. New lesson: defense stocks often peak on war declaration and then mean-revert as government appropriations cycle lags real-time combat spending.

**BofA upgrade timing was perfect for INTC.** INTC pulled back from $111 on June 10 (CPI-day risk-off) to ~$105. BofA upgrade June 11 gap-up to $112.90 = upgraded at the pullback bottom. This is the INTC entry we've been trying to execute for 31 sessions. If API unblocks at any point today, INTC limit bracket GTC is the top priority.

### 2026-06-04 Midday

**GLD price estimate was wrong.** Prior portfolio.md had GLD at $432-435; actual June 3 close $407.91. LESSON: Treat all price estimates as provisional until verified via API.
